title: thevetia nitida
intro: Thevetia nitida, also known as the Yellow Oleander or Elephant's Tooth, is a small deciduous tree or shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thevetia nitida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparation of Thevetia nitida typically involves drying the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential toxicity.
